mapper.select:
SELECT channel_id AS channelId, channel_name AS channelName, channel_type AS channelType, status FROM spread_channel
AND status = 1
ORDER BY status DESC, channel_id ASC

SELECT c.channel_id AS channelId, c.channel_name AS channelName, c.channel_type AS channelType, IFNULL(SUM(d.view_num), 0) AS totalView, IFNULL(SUM(d.exposure_num), 0) AS totalExposure FROM spread_channel c LEFT JOIN spread_data d ON c.channel_id = d.channel_id LEFT JOIN heritage_project p ON d.project_id = p.project_id
c.status = 1 AND (p.project_id IS NULL OR p.status = 1)
GROUP BY c.channel_id, c.channel_name, c.channel_type ORDER BY totalView DESC
